programme.title: Légendes urbaines
programme.desc: Un moment dédié pour donner la parole aux grands acteurs des cultures urbaines mondiales. Une découverte de la face cachée' de ces artistes, derrière les clichés, les postures, et loin de l'actualité promotionnelle.'

programme.desc: The Hub with Wang Guan covers hot-button geopolitical and economic issues, as well as interesting stories and trends in culture, education, technology and lifestyle. programme.title: E17 - Stuck
programme.desc: Stanley has to free Myrtle, who is stuck, using his new tunnelling mole machine so she can attend the schools tree planting day.

programme.title: E21 - Pepper
programme.desc: Pepper performs a bell ringing act.

programme.title: E74 - Blow
programme.desc: It's a windy day and the Teletubbies collect lots of leaves that have blown off the trees. The leaves go everywhere in Home Dome, so The Noo---noo cleans up.

programme.title: E30 - Fairies
programme.desc: Bluey's house has fairies! Tails are being braided, stickers are everywhere, and Mum's got a peg beard. Now the family must band together to hunt for these invisible mischief-makers.

programme.title: E33 - Swim School
programme.desc: Mum, Dad, and Bingo must complete both their classes to pass swim school, but pleasing strict Big Fish instructor Margaret (aka Bluey) is proving to be very difficult.

programme.title: E45 - TV Shop
programme.desc: At the chemist, Bluey and Bingo have fun playing with the CCTV screens.

programme.title: E6 - The Fossil Badge
programme.desc: The squirrels are digging in the garden when they come across a fossil, so Duggee and Narrator explain all about fossils and prehistoric times.

programme.title: E5 - The Footprint Badge
programme.desc: The squirrels are playing hide-and-seek, but they can't find Happy. The squirrels follow lots of different footprints that take them to their friend but there is one set they can't work out.

programme.title: E4 - The Juice Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is going to make the squirrels juice from the garden. Whilst picking the fruit, the squirrels meet a little bug, full of woes about being too small.

programme.title: E5 - The Mouse's Birthday
programme.desc: Sarah's hoping for a nice quiet birthday, but there's no chance once her friends arrive.

programme.title: E18 - Circus
programme.desc: The circus bus has broken down, but the children are waiting for a circus show! Can Stanley help out?

programme.title: E17 - Stuck
programme.desc: Stanley has to free Myrtle, who is stuck, using his new tunnelling mole machine so she can attend the schools tree planting day.

programme.title: E2 - My Grandad Sometimes Steals My Chocolate Buttons
programme.desc: From tickles and piggybacks to no longer being able to do cartwheels, grandparents are brilliant!

programme.title: E29 - Puppets
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo teach Unicorse good manners so he can ask Mum on a date, but things go awry when Unicorse eats a tick.

programme.title: E47 - Go Jet Academy: Volcanic Island
programme.desc: There's trouble erupting for the Go Jetters as Glitch disturbs an underwater volcano...

programme.title: E11 - 張純燁王耀慶敲鑼見證嘉賓尋愛
programme.desc: 以一日為期限，將地點設定為日常生活的三大場景，邀請男女嘉賓在此相聚認識並展開進一步了解；打破戀綜常見的觀察室模式，主理人張純燁將與「助力團」蕭敬騰、大張偉、蒲熠星、蔡國慶、王耀慶面對面見證男女嘉賓們的感情升溫，陪伴他們經歷情感上的甜蜜與失落。

programme.title: E49
programme.desc: 兼顧情緒價值輸出，為女性量身打造兼具時尚審美與人文關懷的變裝微綜藝，全方位多角度地向社會傳遞積極的生活態度；種草生活好物、推薦文旅線路、科普健康知識。

programme.title: E11 - 墨爾本男嘉賓再赴尋愛之約
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》回歸經典規則。男嘉賓登場後，將通過「愛之請回答」「愛之再判斷」「愛之終決選」三個環節與24位女嘉賓互相了解，還有根據大數據匹配的「智推女生」參與最終決選。陳銘、黃瀾加盟「非誠合夥人」，以全新視角解讀愛情。

programme.title: E8 - 混血美女重返舞台
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》全新改版，24位女嘉賓分為心動區和觀察區，男嘉賓暫不亮相，在「第二現場」與女嘉賓隔空對話。男女嘉賓通過雙向選擇，決定兩人能否成功牽手。

programme.title: E49
programme.desc: 兼顧情緒價值輸出，為女性量身打造兼具時尚審美與人文關懷的變裝微綜藝，全方位多角度地向社會傳遞積極的生活態度；種草生活好物、推薦文旅線路、科普健康知識。

programme.title: My First Of May
programme.desc: My First of May follows TANG Suk Yin and his daughter TANG Chi, whose lives are turned upside down when Chi is diagnosed with a serious illness, given little chance to survive past two. Faced with this heart-wrenching reality, Suk Yin and his wife, Elaine YEUNG, promise to cherish every moment with Chi. Miraculously, Chi survives beyond two, but this brings significant changes. The couple sacrifices their dreams to care for her-Suk Yin gives up his squash career, while Elaine, overwhelmed by pressure, abandons the family. In despair, Suk Yin withdraws and becomes a recluse. Without parental support, Chi relies on her grandmother, SUEN Yau Mui. When her grandmother's health deteriorates, Suk Yin can no longer ignore his responsibilities and returns home. After years apart, how will they mend their strained relationships? Unexpectedly, a small understanding from the past helps them reconnect. With Suk Yin's support, Chi gains movement in her ring finger, rekindling love in the

programme.title: Thriller Thursday: Habit
programme.desc: A street-smart party girl gets mixed up in a violent drug deal and finds a possible way out by masquerading as a nun.

programme.title: Knox Goes Away
programme.desc: A contract killer afflicted with dementia must save his estrange son before it's too late.

programme.title: Ash is Purest White
programme.desc: A tragic love story that unfolds in the midst of radical transformations in modern China.

programme.title: E1 - The Wild Is Revealing
programme.desc: 10 Teams of 2 Ordinary Americans Join survival expert Bear Grylls On journeys traversing New Zealand’s Treacherous and diverse terrain while competing for $500,000. In The end, Bear Determines who would never “Get Out Alive”, And the first team is eliminated.

programme.title: E6 - Tim Wells
programme.desc: The Internet's best hunting, fishing, and all around outdoor viral videos. Brought to you all in one show with special guest Tim Wells.

programme.title: E1 - The Wild Is Revealing
programme.desc: 10 Teams of 2 Ordinary Americans Join survival expert Bear Grylls On journeys traversing New Zealand’s Treacherous and diverse terrain while competing for $500,000. In The end, Bear Determines who would never “Get Out Alive”, And the first team is eliminated.

programme.title: E6 - Tim Wells
programme.desc: The Internet's best hunting, fishing, and all around outdoor viral videos. Brought to you all in one show with special guest Tim Wells.

programme.title: E1 - Rollercoaster Renovation
programme.desc: Heide Park Soltau, a german adventure park, offers adrenaline junkies many attractions and rides. The biggest crowd puller is the Colossos wooden roller coaster - the highest and fastest wooden roller coaster in Europe. But over twenty million passengers in fifteen years are taking their toll. The ride closes temporarily and renovation work begins. It is a gigantic task - 1500 metres of track have to be renewed. A complete replacement of all wooden rails has never been done on a comparable facility before. It is a renovation of superlatives for 12.5 million euros. The team is working with the heavy components at heights of up to 60 metres. Safety technology and its correct application are vital. The reopening date is approaching and the pressure is mounting.

programme.title: E4 - Aggressive Measures
programme.desc: An anti-poaching team tracks down poachers to protect vulnerable species in Mozombique.

programme.title: E7 - Dogfight
programme.desc: Mikey shows a veteran Buffalo’s DC-3, WZS, Buffalo’s very own vintage plane from the Second World War. It is being fitted with a special ‘static’ line, which paratroopers will clip onto for a D- Day reenactment jump. But army inspectors tell Mikey a modern military needs a modern line with a winch system in case they need to retrieve a “hung-up jumper”. Cory and Mikey scramble to build the retrieval line before the inspector comes back to test it. But with their bumbling and fumbling, it doesn’t look like they will make the cut. Meanwhile, Chris Staples and some of Buffalo’s pilots head down to Fullerton, California, to Air Combat USA, where pilots get to experience aerial dogfights in real fighter planes. The pilots do yo-yos, spins and pull Gs to out-maneuver their opponent. First up in the dogfights are newly checked-out co-pilot Sam Storm versus longtime co-pilot David Alexandre. Sam wins the fight due to David’s inability to hold down his breakfast. Next up is cocky co-pilot Chris

But army inspectors tell Mikey a modern military needs a modern line with a winch system in case they need to retrieve a “hung-up jumper”. Cory and Mikey scramble to build the retrieval line before the inspector comes back to test it. But with their bumbling and fumbling, it doesn’t look like they will make the cut. Meanwhile, Chris Staples and some of Buffalo’s pilots head down to Fullerton, California, to Air Combat USA, where pilots get to experience aerial dogfights in real fighter planes. The pilots do yo-yos, spins and pull Gs to out-maneuver their opponent. First up in the dogfights are newly checked-out co-pilot Sam Storm versus longtime co-pilot David Alexandre. Sam wins the fight due to David’s inability to hold down his breakfast. Next up is cocky co-pilot Chris

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: 講述在司法不公不義的社會中，地下秘密的士公司「彩虹運輸」存在著一位特殊部隊出身的代表的士司機替一群無法受到法律保護的被害者們找回公理。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 講述兩名截然不同的人 ─ 缺乏同情心的騙子與同情心氾濫的律師因與邪惡抗爭，組成了一支看起來不太可能實現的聯盟後所發生的故事。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 劇情講述一個少女的失蹤交織著無數的謊言和慾望，牽涉其中的七個人遭遇重大事件後發生的故事。這七個人都會為了個人私慾背叛，出賣他人，過著充滿謊言的生活。​

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 故事背景設定在不久的將來，在這個世界中，人們過去的性關係通過一條發光的紅色「S線」在他們頭頂上方以視覺方式連接。一位刑警、一位神秘的老師，以及一個天生能看到這些線的少女，共同應對由這一現象引發的系列令人不安的事件。

programme.title: E4 - Invisible Hideaways
programme.desc: In Uruguay we venture deep within the rural countryside to an area of remote forests and lakes to a one hundred hectare resort of mirrored cabins. In Sweden we visit the Kolarbyn Eco Lodge - a rustic retreat of 12 hobbit like huts that are replicas of those built in this forest by people making charcoal from as far back as the 1800s.

programme.desc: Together on Graham's sofa tonight: Hollywood star of 'Alien' and 'Avatar', Sigourney Weaver, taking to the West End stage in Shakespeare's 'The Tempest'; Hollywood star Nicholas Hoult, starring in the remake of the classic gothic horror 'Nosferatu'; celebrity chef Jamie Oliver, whose new cookbook is 'Simply Jamie'; Lolly Adefope, playing set assistant Dag in the superhero-spoof series 'The Franchise'; and supergroup Coldplay, who chat and perform their current single 'All My Life'.

programme.title: E1 - Learning to Do the Right Thing!
programme.desc: Join Buster as he learns to do the right thing! When Buster accidentally breaks the class flower, he panics & tries to cover it up, but soon learns that telling the truth is always the best thing to do. Then, when he & Daddy spot a steam train speeding out of control, they know they have to do the right thing! They race after the train & save the day! From cleaning up his toys to helping a puppy, Buster is always trying to do the right thing.

programme.title: E1 - When Buster's Dreams Come to Life!
programme.desc: Join Buster as his amazing dreams come to life! First, he dreams he is a fish, complete with a tail & fins! He's scared when he meets a big shark, but soon learns the shark just wants a friend to play with. Then, it's all stations go as Buster dreams he's a space rocket & blasts off to tour all the planets! The dreams continue as he becomes Sheriff Buster in the wild west & finds a magic spell book that causes all sorts of trouble!

programme.title: E3 - Fun Nature Discoveries!
programme.desc: Join Blippi for some fun nature discoveries! First, he & D.BO dive to the ocean floor to help a forgetful island remember why it doesn't float away. Then, they shrink down for some smaller adventures! They help a firefly find a friend with the same blinking pattern, float high in the sky to learn how bubbles are made & join a group of ants on a mission to find out how they walk in such a straight line. The adventure is full of singing, science & new friends!

programme.title: E1 - Solving the Biggest Mysteries!
programme.desc: Mila & Morphle are on the case, solving the biggest mysteries in town! When Aunt Augustine's new necklace is stolen, Detective Mila & Morphle find clues to track down the culprits. Then, Winston & the Bandits steal a time machine & use it to go to the future! Mila & Morphle must follow them to get it back. The mysteries continue as the Bandits steal Morphle & the friends must find him, & a body swap device causes a confusing mix-up!

programme.title: E2 - A Big Day of Teamwork & Fixes!
programme.desc: It's a big day of teamwork & fixes at Gecko's Garage! When the Mechanicals accidentally injure Gecko's foot, they must learn the value of teamwork to finish repairing Bobby the Bus by themselves. Then, when Green Mechanical gets stressed, Gecko teaches her mindfulness tips to calm down. The teamwork continues as Gecko helps his rival, Mr. Weasel, fix an engine with a clean electric one, & the whole crew works together to repair Trevor the Tractor's giant gears!

programme.title: E4 - A Big Day of Imagination & Play
programme.desc: Get ready for a big day of imagination & play with Mia & Max! First, they decide to let their imagination run free & build a big dollhouse, but Max has more fun pretending to be a dinosaur that knocks it down! Then, Daddy & Twinkle show the kids how much fun can be had with shadow puppets, making all sorts of different animal shapes. The imaginative fun continues as they turn five empty green bottles into fuzzy-armed monsters that Twinkle brings to life!

programme.title: E4 - A Big Day of Imagination & Play
programme.desc: Get ready for a big day of imagination & play with Mia & Max! First, they decide to let their imagination run free & build a big dollhouse, but Max has more fun pretending to be a dinosaur that knocks it down! Then, Daddy & Twinkle show the kids how much fun can be had with shadow puppets, making all sorts of different animal shapes. From cleaning up his toys to helping a puppy, Buster is always trying to do the right thing.

programme.title: E4 - Answering Big Questions!
programme.desc: Blippi is answering some of life's biggest questions! He shrinks down for a night adventure in a mouth to learn the right way to brush teeth from Bill Brushy. Then, he flies up a nose to find out what makes us sneeze! His curiosity continues as he learns how a fly can walk upside down on the ceiling, discovers the artistic process of how spiders make their webs & even becomes a contestant on a game show to learn the difference between fruits & vegetables!

programme.title: E1 - Mom's Crazy Inventions Go Haywire!
programme.desc: Mom's crazy inventions are going haywire! First, Arpo & Daniel have fun with the new voice-controlled smart house, until it starts having a tantrum & they have to figure out how to calm it down. Then, Mom's new time travel machine accidentally turns a pigeon into a giant pterodactyl, forcing Arpo to catch it! The mayhem continues when Daniel takes a flying smartcrib on a joyride & Arpo has to chase a remote-controlled truck that's gone out of control!

programme.title: E1 - Learning to Do the Right Thing!

programme.title: E2 - A Big Day of Discovery & Play!
programme.desc: Get ready for a big day of discovery & play with Twinkle & her friends! The fun starts as they learn to play new musical instruments, with Twinkle on drums, Kitty on the sax & Bunny on guitar! Then, it's time to play a fun game of 'Twinkle Says'! Follow along as they give you playful instructions & see if you can keep up. The discoveries continue as the friends find a mirror & make funny faces & wonder what an umbrella is for before it starts to rain!

programme.title: E8 - The Fork
programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.title: E24 - The Pirate Of Manava
programme.desc: Yann and his little sister Marina live with their uncle Patrick, a famous oceanographer, on a Polynesian atoll. The two children meet Oum, a mysterious white dolphin who's always keen to help those he likes. Their friendship sees them exploring the ocean depths together.

programme.title: E1785
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: E22 - Immigration, An Opportunity For The Auvergne-Rhone-Alpes Region?
programme.desc: At the crossroads of Switzerland and Italy, the Auvergne-Rhone-Alpes region is the second in France in terms of migratory flows. The situation is mixed and affects large cities more than rural departments, but it has led the region to explore the issue of ''living together''.

programme.title: Les Prix Du Cinema Suisse 2026:2026
programme.desc: Each year the Swiss Film Awards honour the best of Swiss cinema. We look back at the 2026 ceremony with the main prize-winners, who share their reactions immediately after receiving their awards.

programme.title: E8 - Who Were You?
programme.desc: Leon has returned to his former home with his grandfather. Francis comes clean with his son and tells him everything he needs to know about the relationship between Marianne and Violette.

programme.title: 10 Things You Don't Know About Malaysia
programme.desc: Think you know Malaysia? Think again. Ezra Zaid will take you on a journey to explore and discover the unexpected sides. Uncover twists behind the historical tales, figures and places you thought you knew.

programme.title: E16 - Mysteries Of The Missing Link
programme.desc: Today, human civilisation spans the globe, and there are more than 7 billion people on Earth. But how did humanity evolve? Were there other kinds of human-like creatures?

programme.title: E9 - The Mystery Of Machu Picchu
programme.desc: With 500-year-old secrets hidden in skeletons and stone, Machu Picchu is one of the most puzzling archaeological sites on earth. Who built this astonishing complex, and why?

programme.title: E1 - Origin Stories
programme.desc: Get acquainted with an array of ocean oddballs and learn how billions of years’ worth of changes, from ice ages to asteroid strikes, have shaped their looks and skills. Meet blind worms who fish, walking sharks, tree-climbing crabs, and much more.

programme.title: E1 - How to Catch a Lizard
programme.desc: Tag along as Dr. Amanda rescues a blind pet baboon, and watch Dr. Charlotte’s tricky surgery on a pangolin whose leg must be amputated after a run-in with poachers. Later, chase a rhino, two young baboons gone AWOL, and a fiesty monitor lizard.

programme.title: E2 - An Island Home
programme.desc: Face a tough decision when Esti’s leg infection puts the brakes on this young duiker’s release. Then track and collar a young lion with Dr. Amanda; check on an ailing bush baby; and greet the noisy new addition to the center, a grumpy grey parrot.

programme.title: E1 - Insect Apocalypse
programme.desc: Look at what a global insect decline could do to our planet. Uncover our historical dependence on these tiny animals, the vital roles they play in our ecosystems, and the reasons why our fragile relationship to them is in danger worldwide.

programme.title: E4 - Beast Buddies
programme.desc: Meet more Amazing Animal Friends, an animal shelter puppy that helps a captive cheetah cub get ready for the wild, and an injured monkey who wins over a pack of unfriendly dogs and a lonely mongoose that enjoys foraging with a flock of sheep.

programme.desc: Face a tough decision when Esti’s leg infection puts the brakes on this young duiker’s release. Then track and collar a young lion with Dr. Amanda; check on an ailing bush baby; and greet the noisy new addition to the center, a grumpy grey parrot.

programme.title: E1 - How to Catch a Lizard

programme.title: E1 - Insect Apocalypse
programme.desc: Look at what a global insect decline could do to our planet. Uncover our historical dependence on these tiny animals, the vital roles they play in our ecosystems, and the reasons why our fragile relationship to them is in danger worldwide.

programme.title: E4 - Beast Buddies
programme.desc: Meet more Amazing Animal Friends, an animal shelter puppy that helps a captive cheetah cub get ready for the wild, and an injured monkey who wins over a pack of unfriendly dogs and a lonely mongoose that enjoys foraging with a flock of sheep.

programme.title: E4 - Beast Buddies
programme.desc: Meet more Amazing Animal Friends, an animal shelter puppy that helps a captive cheetah cub get ready for the wild, and an injured monkey who wins over a pack of unfriendly dogs and a lonely mongoose that enjoys foraging with a flock of sheep.

programme.title: E12 - Alone In The World
programme.desc: Alexis and Thomas are in complete autonomy deep in the remote wilderness of Kluane National Park. Facing unpredictable weather and no emergency support, their knowledge is put to the test.

programme.title: E10 - Acid Ocean
programme.desc: In 2025, humanity officially crossed a seventh planetary boundary: ocean acidification. A critical threshold with irreversible consequences for marine ecosystems. At the tip of Finistere, Fabrice Pernet must rethink his work as a researcher. He studies shellfish, sentinels of this disruption.

programme.title: E5 - Drug Trafficking/Avalanches/Craftspeople/Tiny Houses
programme.desc: On the agenda: the fight against drug trafficking in the Antilles; meeting the rescuers who intervene when avalanches strike; craftspeople facing competition from online commerce; a focus on the manufacturing of tiny houses in the Vosges...

programme.title: E25 - In Caen (Best Of)
programme.desc: The best moments of the show in Caen.

programme.title: E13 - New At The Salon Des Antiquaires
programme.desc: The Fab Paris fair brings together antique dealers and art merchants around a wide range of works spanning from Antiquity to the present day, highlighting the richness and diversity of the French market. Also, a stroll through the Passage du Grand Cerf, a gem of the 2nd arrondissement, where specialty shops and unusual objects coexist.

programme.title: Clownfish and White Tiger
programme.desc: We follow the aquarium team as they initiate their very own breeding program with the hope of finding many more clownfish to come. In the meantime, Lin Mao, the white tiger, has something wrong with his hip and the vets need to make a diagnosis.

programme.title: Rock
programme.desc: Hepi and Briko have some solid ideas about what we can make with rocks.

programme.title: The Gift
programme.desc: Sprinter receives a present from a secret admirer. The gift is a statue, but it's not a pretty sight. He doubts that maybe it is from a supervillain! Then he starts to make deformed statues, of the villains, as revenge.

programme.title: Oceanic Trench
programme.desc: When the bathyscaph fails during the descent, trapping Kit and Mr. Battery inside, they recall their previous troubles and how they got out of them.

programme.title: Trip to South Korea
programme.desc: Zoe's mum doesn't like cakes, so Zoe isn't sure what to make for her birthday. Alim suggests visiting their penfriend Kachiko, who lives in South Korea. They meet up with her on the beach.

programme.title: Gorilla Foot
programme.desc: Ubongo, the gorilla, has a massive cut on his foot. But how do you treat a 400-pound gorilla with a sore foot? And have you ever seen a sloth take a shower? Hugo, the sloth, will draw back the shower curtain and reveal all.

programme.title: Panama
programme.desc: Panama City adventure: Explored the iconic Panama Canal, rainforest boat ride, aerial tram above treetops, learned the traditional cumbia dance, and explored the cultural gems of Casco Viejo with local teens. A week of diverse experiences in Central America!

programme.title: Oceanic Trench
programme.desc: When the bathyscaph fails during the descent, trapping Kit and Mr. Battery inside, they recall their previous troubles and how they got out of them.

programme.title: The Era of the Air Pump
programme.desc: Eric makes a rocket from a plastic bottle and some cardboard. Then he uses an air pump to cause a transfer of energy that is strong enough to launch the rocket into the sky.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met... a Violin
programme.desc: Henry meets a friendly Violin, and he becomes a Conductor to lead the instruments in a big orchestral performance!

programme.title: Sea Lamprey
programme.desc: Daddy Owl and Tiny Owl are impressed by the rock-moving abilities of the sea lamprey. And Grandad recalls when he shared a flat with an old lamprey called Gilly.

programme.title: The Era of the Air Pump
programme.desc: Eric makes a rocket from a plastic bottle and some cardboard. Then he uses an air pump to cause a transfer of energy that is strong enough to launch the rocket into the sky.

programme.title: Loki's Castle
programme.desc: The Nektons take over the Dark Orca submarine. But the pirates take over the Aronnax. No one is happy with having strangers in their homes.

programme.title: Battle Ground
programme.desc: The Icicles are in Austria for the Synchro World Championships. They have to pull out a show-stopping performance to beat their rivals. Josh and Kloe get into the spirit of Christmas, and disaster strikes for Charlie in his speed skating debut.

programme.title: Trip to South Korea

programme.title: Measuring Time
programme.desc: Back in the Middle Ages, methods for telling the time are a far cry from the ones we know today. Church bells and the position of the sun are pretty much all they've got. So inventors are constantly trying to come up with all kinds of new systems to measure time.

programme.title: Seniorita
programme.desc: Senior has received a love letter! Sprinter is sure that a supervillain is behind it since Senior is old! He can not receive love letters, can he?

programme.title: Trip to Morocco
programme.desc: Zoe is disgusted when she sees that Alim starts eating the chocolate mousse she prepared without a spoon. Soon after, they travel to Morocco and learn more about the eating customs there.

programme.title: Mighty Muscles!
programme.desc: One of Britain's strongest women, Andrea Thompson, joins the Doctors in the lab as they reveal how muscle fibers work, and we welcome three more incredible Ouch! Award finalists.

programme.title: Electromagnetic Attraction
programme.desc: Eric learns how to make an electromagnet using a nail, a battery and some electrical wire. The electricity passing through the wire creates an invisible force called a magnetic field, making the nail work like a magnet. He uses it to pick up paper clips from the table.

Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: Hidden Doors! Exploring The Unknown World (New)
programme.desc: Aiba Masaki hosts a brand‑new overseas travel show like no other. He visits hidden places rarely introduced in Japanese media, guided by local residents, and also travels abroad to thank the people who make the everyday items we rely on. From stunning scenery and unique cuisine to surprising lifestyles and unexpected ties to Japan, the show uncovers the world's hidden secrets.

programme.title: Exciting New World
programme.desc: This program takes you into an exciting new world that captivate your heart.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: News & Weather
programme.desc: The latest up-to-date news and nationwide weather information.

programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC's Scott Wapner, “Closing Bell” guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what's driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. “Closing Bell: Overtime” takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow's trading day.

programme.title: CNBC Cures: Defying Rare Disease
programme.desc: CNBC's Becky Quick steps out from behind the anchor desk to share her family's private battle with her daughter's rare disease. Through her story and others like it, Quick reveals the challenges facing families trapped between breakthrough science and funding gaps.

programme.title: Unlocked
programme.desc: Unlocked is a home tour series focused on how much people across the globe spend on their housing, what they get for the money and what they had to sacrifice to make it happen. programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what's driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime

programme.title: Bini Chapter 1: Born To Win[Live]
programme.desc: A feature documentary chronicling the rise of BINI, the Filipino P‑pop girl group, tracing their origins, intensive pre‑debut training, early challenges-including the ABS‑CBN shutdown and pandemic years-and their growing success leading up to their first solo concert, Biniverse. The film features behind‑the‑scenes footage, personal stories, and the group's milestone achievements in 2024, highlighting themes of resilience, sisterhood, and artistic growth.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E23
programme.desc: 失意的女拳手劉鹽隻身踏上異國尋母之路，憑藉著拼命想要「贏一次」的野蠻生命力，在男主角盧天馳的支持與守護下，在拳擊與美食這兩個領域都闖出自己的天地，完成了人生的逆襲。

programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。
